name: Live Channels
overview: Build looping virtual TV channels served as an M3U tuner and XMLTV guide.
description: Live Channels lets administrators build looping virtual TV channels from genres and official ratings or from a hand-picked list of items. Each channel is exposed through an M3U tuner at /livechannels/tuner.m3u8 and an XMLTV guide at /livechannels/guide.xmltv, which Jellyfin's own Live TV can consume as an M3U Tuner and XMLTV guide source.

versions.changelog:
## Initial Release!

This plugin exists because I need to test Live TV for Swiftfin and I wanted a simple(r) tuner configuration as I found a lot of the alternatives to be a little too involved for what I wanted.
